headline: Graco Surpasses Q2 Earnings Estimates, Reaffirms 2026 View
summary: GGG beats Q2 earnings estimates and reaffirms its 2026 outlook, with stronger margins and a growing order backlog despite softer organic sales.

headline: Ariel Small/Mid Cap Value Q2 2026 Portfolio Activity
